name: io.github.Perufitlife/supabase-security-mcp
description: Audit, preview, and apply Supabase security fixes from inside any MCP-compatible AI agent. The only Supabase scanner that closes the loop with auto-remediation (preview + rollback + re-audit).

environmentVariables.name: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Supabase Personal Access Token. Get one at https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens
